title: Shelf Numbers
description: Displays the quantity of items on shelves
body:
## Shelf Numbers
This mod allows you to easily see the quantity of items placed in shelves. It is only for the client-side and will work on any single-player world or server (provided they send the correct packets for shelves). Additionally, it will also work for any modded shelf that correctly registers itself as a `ShelfBlockEntity`.

![Image showing the item counts on a shelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b2db1208fe0b002497b3f85ea3c288a270af283.png)

### Config
Using the config, you can change several aspects of how the mod renders the text. The config can be accessed by using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) or by editing the JSON file at `config/shelf_numbers.json`

### Bugs?
You can submit bugs here: [https://github.com/Illusioner2520/Shelf-Numbers/issues](https://github.com/Illusioner2520/Shelf-Numbers/issues)
